description: Letter from Nissim b. Avraham to Nahray b. Nissim (Fustat). Dating: ca. 1050s. About a consignment of silk that was about to reach Fustat, owned in partnership by the sender and Barhūn b. Mūsā al-Tāhartī. Nahray is requested to sell the silk as quickly as possible and to keep the sale secret. Nissim's travel plans imply that he writes from an important centre in the delta. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, p. 506-507.)
tags: secret, silk, Nahray B. Nissim, trade, al-Tahirti
